calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Reinstating Petitioner To Active Status
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Rafael Matias Langer-Osuna, Esq. of SQUIRE PATTON BOGGS, T:415.954.0200, for petitioner/moving party;
No other appearance:

RULING: The motion was not filed timely and was not on the court's calendar prior to today's hearing. The matter was discussed. After hearing, there being no opposition, and to the satisfaction of the Court,

PETITIONER GOODMAN USA, INC.'s Verified Petition For Order Reinstating Petitioner To Active Status is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
